title: Glide 1.8.9 is here 🏎️
body:
🚇 Tunnels & underground now covered — Glide keeps scoring and coaching you even with no GPS.

🎛️ New live G-force gauge shows the forces on your car in real time as you drive.

🎓 New driver? Prefer to have 100% focus on the road? Enable 'Tutor mode' in the settings and examine your score after you park.

DRIVE SAFE!
